summary: Frontend-only testing for RADAR V22 three changes: (1) FB Formada display in history order [c,b,a], (2) Horizontal layout FB card showing 2+ patterns without scrolling, (3) BAIXO(1-12)/MÉDIO(13-24)/ALTO(25-36) tags with MÉDIO having dark blue background + white text. ALL 4 test scenarios PASSED.

tests_executed.name: Tag ranges (0=ZERO, 1-12=BAIXO, 13-24=MÉDIO, 25-36=ALTO)
tests_executed.details: All 8 tested numbers (0,3,12,13,15,24,25,30) show correct tag text, class and colors. BAIXO bg=rgb(0,255,255) text black. MÉDIO bg=rgb(26,58,107) text white. ALTO bg=rgb(255,0,255) text white. ZERO green text.

tests_executed.name: FB Formada order for [5,3,12]
tests_executed.details: Formada displayed as [12,3,5] matching expected history order [c,b,a]. Entrada row has 4 gold-confluencia (golden border) balls.

tests_executed.name: FB Formada order for [5,3,12,4]
tests_executed.details: Latest pattern (from last 3 = [3,12,4]) shows Formada=[4,12,3]. Previous pattern [12,3,5] also retained (tentativas countdown). Incorrect order [12,3,4] NOT present.

tests_executed.name: Horizontal layout - FB card with 2+ patterns visible
tests_executed.details: After switching to horizontal mode with 4 numbers giving 2 patterns, both Formada rows [12,3,5] and [4,12,3] rendered inside viewport (top 877-1023px, viewport 1080). patternCount=2, visible=2, all entry balls have golden gold-confluencia border.

critical_code_review_comments: RadarTab.jsx is 690 lines. Consider splitting sub-components (HistoryCard, JuncaoCard, EstrategiaFBCard etc.) into separate files for maintainability (>700-line threshold close).
detectFBPattern returns same formed=[c,b,a] in all 3 branches; the 3 branches could be simplified to single return after determining remaining.
localStorage writes every render via useEffect on giros - fine, but consider debounce if performance matters.
seed_data_creation: None - used btn-N to add numbers in-session
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 requested changes verified passing. MÉDIO color verified rgb(26,58,107) with white text. Horizontal FB card shows 2 patterns in viewport at 1920x1080. FB Formada always renders in [c,b,a] = newest-first-of-last-3 order regardless of which pair matched the digital root. getHighLow() in radarEngine.js lines 121-126 correctly implements BAIXO(1-12)/MÉDIO(13-24)/ALTO(25-36).
